title: Jejak Senyum di Lorong Kota
theme: Menemukan keajaiban dalam rutinitas sehari-hari melalui penjelajahan tak terduga di sudut-sudut kota yang tersembunyi.

cover.prompt: A vibrant, sun-drenched cityscape during midday, showcasing a bustling downtown area with towering skyscrapers and compact street pathways. A delivery scooter or bicycle, carrying a neatly wrapped package, moves through dynamic urban activity. The scene is bathed in bright, warm light, emphasizing the energetic pace of the city. A distant, stylized figure or a clear silhouette of a courier on their vehicle is visible, conveying a sense of optimistic journey against a backdrop of urban movement. The overall mood is positive and full of life, highlighting the daily adventures of city exploration.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, warm color grading

meta.plan_summary: A cheerful delivery courier, Joni, discovers a hidden 'Jalan Tikus Bahagia' (Happy Rat Alley) while searching for a shortcut in a bustling city. This alley leads him to a magical, time-warped part of the city filled with eccentric shops and vibrant murals, making him feel delightfully lost. Facing a tight delivery deadline, he meets an insightful street artist named Mita who provides a mystical shortcut and a profound philosophy about finding beauty in the journey, revitalizing his spirit. Joni successfully delivers the package on time, returning home inspired and with a newfound appreciation for the hidden adventures within his daily routine.
